failures.query: How many patients are there per site?
failures.generated_sql: SELECT s.name AS site_name, COUNT(pt.id) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker pt JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id WHERE pt.is_active = true AND pt.is_deleted = false GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY patient_count DESC;

failures.query: What are the top 5 sites by patient count?
failures.generated_sql: SELECT s.name AS site_name, COUNT(pt.id) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker pt JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id WHERE pt.is_active = true AND pt.is_deleted = false GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY patient_count DESC LIMIT 5;

failures.query: Show patient count by organization and site
failures.generated_sql: SELECT o.name AS organization_name, s.name AS site_name, COUNT(pt.id) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker pt JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id JOIN organization o ON s.organization_id = o.id WHERE pt.is_active = true AND pt.is_deleted = false GROUP BY o.name, s.name ORDER BY organization_name, pati

failures.query: Show the screening coverage rate by site
failures.generated_sql: SELECT s.name AS site_name, COUNT(pt.id) AS total_patients, COUNT(CASE WHEN pt.is_screened = true THEN 1 END) AS screened, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN pt.is_screened = true THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(pt.id), 0), 2) AS coverage_rate FROM patient_tracker pt JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id WHERE pt.

failures.query: Which sites have more than 1000 active patients?
failures.generated_sql: SELECT s.name AS site_name, COUNT(pt.id) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker pt JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id WHERE pt.is_active = true AND pt.is_deleted = false GROUP BY s.name HAVING COUNT(pt.id) > 1000 ORDER BY patient_count DESC;

failures.query: Show average glucose values by organization
failures.generated_sql: SELECT o.name AS organization_name, ROUND(AVG(gl.glucose_value), 1) AS avg_glucose FROM glucose_log gl JOIN patient_tracker pt ON gl.patient_tracker_id = pt.id JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id JOIN organization o ON s.organization_id = o.id WHERE gl.is_active = true AND gl.is_deleted = false GROUP B
